title: Burp Suite
description: The industry-standard web application security testing platform — intercept, modify, and replay HTTP traffic.
fullExplanation: Burp Suite is the most widely used web application security testing tool. It acts as an HTTP/HTTPS proxy between your browser and the target, allowing you to intercept, inspect, and modify every request and response. The Pro version adds an automated scanner, Intruder for fuzzing, and Collaborator for out-of-band testing. Used by security professionals worldwide for manual and automated web app testing.

components.name: Proxy
components.description: Intercept and modify HTTP/HTTPS requests and responses in real-time

components.name: Repeater
components.description: Manually resend and modify individual requests — test parameter tampering

components.name: Intruder
components.description: Automated fuzzer — brute force, parameter fuzzing, payload injection

components.name: Scanner (Pro)
components.description: Automated vulnerability scanner — SQLi, XSS, SSRF, XXE, and more

components.name: Decoder
components.description: Encode/decode Base64, URL, HTML, hex, gzip — analyze obfuscated data

components.name: Comparer
components.description: Diff two requests/responses — spot subtle differences

components.name: Collaborator (Pro)
components.description: Out-of-band server for detecting blind SSRF, XXE, blind SQLi

components.name: Extensions (BApp Store)
components.description: 500+ community extensions — JWT editor, Active Scan++, Autorize

keyFacts: Industry standard for web app pentesting and bug bounty
Community edition is free — Pro adds scanner and Intruder throttle removal
Burp Collaborator: unique subdomain for detecting out-of-band interactions
Match and Replace rules: auto-modify requests (add headers, change values)
Scope control: only intercept/scan in-scope targets
HTTP history: full log of all proxied requests — searchable
OWASP Top 10 testing: Burp covers all 10 categories
